title: Skyblock Infinite
description: Skyblock for any seed with Infinite void generation.
body:
# Skyblock Infinite

The next generation of the classic Skyblock we all know and love! 


## Infinite Void: 
No terrain will generate no matter how far you travel! No world border will stop you from exploring and finding new structures or biomes!

## Note: This uses Custom Terrain Generation, which is not compatible with Minecraft Realms, Bedrock Edition, and some modded clients.

## If you are looking for a compaitble server host, [try out BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/drtrog).
[![BisectHosting Discount][1]][2]

[1]:  https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/34ff95de-e3ed-4453-a4ec-dbdf0e64bd87.webp
[2]: https://bisecthosting.com/drtrog "BisectHosting Discount"



## Structure Generation:
All important structures generate floating in the void! Witch Huts, Nether Fortresses, Strongholds, and many more all generate in the empty void.

## Config Menu:
Select how you want islands to generate. You can either pick Seed based islands or the Classic islands. 

- Seed: Islands generate based on the biome you are in.

- Classic: The Skyblock island [grid/layout] you all know and love.

  ![Config Menu](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/YVMr2l79/images/d911d93f5c48d98e662cdb29d4f3a91e4584c2f2.png)


There will be more options added to this menu in the future, so keep an eye out.

## How to Install
1. Start creating a new world and click the **More** tab at the top left
2. Click the **"Data Packs"** button
3. Click the **"Open Pack Folder"** button
4. Drag and drop the datapack into the folder
5. Click on the Skyblock Infinite datapack in the **"Available"** list
6. Finish creating your world!


## Join the Community

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/cxkP79kPMz) to get help with your Skyblock questions, or just come and hang out with other Skyblockers!



## Island Design Contributers:
- **Doovid:** Jagged Peaks, Swamp, Badlands, Dark Forest
- **PandaX:** Mangrove, Lush Cave, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Desert, Savanna, Birch, Dripstone Cave
- **Porg Collector:** Deep Frozen Ocean
- **Andergamez:** Beach
- **MrAmericanMike:** Mushroom Fields
- **WolfButterCup:** Ice Spikes
- **Anathra:** Sulfur Caves
